title: no news one year on
wikitext:
[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Sep 01, 2008 2:11 pm Here's an interesting little tidbit. It's been 1 year to the day since the release of EVANGELION 1.0 on Japanese shores. And still no news of 2.0. Real impressive on their part.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 01, 2008 2:42 pm Um, well, I guess, thanks for pointing that out.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 01, 2008 2:49 pm You know what happens to rebuild threads that get full of "why is there no news?", don't you?

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 01, 2008 4:28 pm Everyone who asks "why is there no 2.0 news?" should get temp-banned from this subforum until there actually is news.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Sep 01, 2008 5:40 pm Can you temp ban me from it so I don't keep accidently coming in here?

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 01, 2008 5:48 pm Why not lock anything pertaining to 2.0 until someone has legitimate proof of any news, and then they can pm you to unlock a thread to post it. I know it is a lot of work, but it is just a suggestion.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Sep 01, 2008 5:52 pm Cause banning them would annoy them which makes it all the more entertaining. Which is probably why I wont get that ban... That and I'm not certain it's possible.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Tue Sep 02, 2008 9:38 am Who said there is no news? As mentioned a very few times, it is coming up quite shortly, or will be spring 2009 (unless unexpected things crop up). Finis.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Tue Sep 02, 2008 10:18 am The Imperialist wrote: Who said there is no news? As mentioned a very few times, it is coming up quite shortly, or will be spring 2009 (unless unexpected things crop up). Finis.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Wed Sep 03, 2008 2:23 am Well, the more detailed things may have, but the more general aspects like it is either within this year, or spring 2009 is a given fact, so...

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Sep 03, 2008 9:12 am ...we have nothing but rumors, speculation and wishful thinking to rely on.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Thu Sep 04, 2008 6:21 am WEEELLllll, there are some facts, but aside from that, there isn't much. Aside from maybe get insider information, or to logically construct the possibilities.

[]: Post by Dartz » Thu Sep 04, 2008 12:43 pm It's like those all those fanfics on FFN with 'updated next week' at the end.... Dating from 2004 Also: Isteach roimh an glas!!!
